message:
chore(tui): Remove unused SequenceGrid prop definitions

Clean up SequenceGrid component by removing three unused prop definitions
that were added speculatively for future features but are not currently
implemented or passed by any caller.

Removed from SequenceGridProps interface:
- showColumnHeaders?: boolean - Column header display toggle (unused)
- showMinimap?: boolean - Minimap visualization toggle (unused)
- showRowNumbers?: boolean - Row number display toggle (unused)

Removed from function parameter destructuring:
- showColumnHeaders = true (commented out default)
- showMinimap = true (commented out default)
- showRowNumbers = true (commented out default)

These props were added in a previous commit as placeholders for potential
future enhancements but were never wired to actual rendering logic. The
commented-out default values in the destructuring created unnecessary
code noise without providing functionality.

If these features are implemented in the future, the props can be
re-added with proper implementation rather than keeping dead code
in the interface definition.
